gaps.reason: Existing exports show summaries and metrics but not the polished four-card KPI row required for high-quality full app generation.

recommendation: Use the existing corpus for most dashboard, form, Data table, Kanban/Collection, timeline, action, and advanced-control templates. Create a smaller golden reference app focused on KPI card polish and print-page composition.
